free_text: Measurement of reaction cross section for proton-rich
nuclei (A<30) at intermediate energies.
Heavy Ion Research Facility.
Radioactive Ion Beam Line                .
36-Ar primary beam on a 9-Be target.
Carbon (109.7 mg/cm2)
The resolution of TOF is 4 ns.
Five transmission Si surface barrier
detectors. The thickness of the six Si detectors was
150, 150, 150, 700, 700 and 2000 um, respectively.
The energy resolution for six dE detectors is not
greater than 1.8%.
A detailed comparison between the experimental
reaction cross sections at intermediate energies and
the calculation with Glauber model was made.
For a consistent comparison the experimental reaction
cross sections transferred to 30 MeV/nucleon using
Shen's formula were listed in the same table.
Proton halo structure.
The error bars include
statistic errors and systematic errors
Tbl.1 from Nucl.Phys.,A707(2002)303
by F.Ch
Last checking has been done.
SD: Entry re-compiled. All MISC's cols
deleted. Information moved to ADD-RES.
SD: MISC1, MISC2, MISC-ERR deleted. Energy
value from MISC2 moved to EN col. MEV -> MEV/A.
